class.name: CassieSurfaceConstraint
class.brief_description: Marks that a stroke was drawing on a surface patch.
class.description: Dual-phase constraint with an entry [member start_position] and an optional exit [member end_position] when the user left the patch mid-stroke. Not a [CassieConstraint] subclass — surface intent is treated separately from intersection and mirror constraints.

method.name: has_left_mid_stroke
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] once [method leave] has been called.

method.name: leave
method.description: Marks the stroke as having left the surface at [param position] and records the exit point.

members.member: Position where the stroke left the patch, only valid after [method leave].
Identifier of the surface patch the stroke entered.
Position where the stroke entered the patch.
